data.title: SNDL reports successful resolutions at 2025 Annual and Special Meeting of Shareholders. Good news for holders of common shares.
data.description: SNDL Inc. (NASDAQ: SNDL) (CSE: SNDL) announced on July 31, 2025, that resolutions were passed at the Annual and Special Meeting of Shareholders held in Edmonton, AB. Shareholders voted in favor of the resolutions presented by the Company. SNDL expressed satisfaction with the outcome of the Meeting, where important decisions were made regarding the common shares.

data.title: MicroStrategy beats Q2 earnings with revenue of $114.49 million, up 2.7% YoY, and reports Bitcoin yield at 19.7%.
data.description: MicroStrategy Inc, trading as Strategy, released their Q2 financial results, surpassing analyst expectations. The company reported revenue of $114.49 million, exceeding the estimated $112.96 million. Adjusted earnings per share for the quarter were $32.52. Year-over-year, total revenue increased by 2.7%. Revenue by segment includes: Subscription Services at $40.8 million, up by 69.5%; Product Licenses and Subscription Services at $48 million, up by 43.9%; and Product Support at $52.1 million. For further details, the complete article is available for access on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Mike T. Fitzgerald named CFO of BWX Technologies with NYSE: BWXT stock, interim CFO since May 12, joined in 2022. CEO impressed by his work.
data.description: BWX Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: BWXT) based in Lynchburg, Virginia, has appointed Mike T. Fitzgerald as the Chief Financial Officer. Fitzgerald, who had been serving as the interim CFO since May 12, has been praised for his exceptional performance in the role. Rex Geveden, the President and CEO of BWXT, commended Fitzgerald for his strategic acumen and comprehensive grasp of the company's operations. Fitzgerald initially joined BWXT in 2022 as the Vice President of Finance and Chief Officer, and his transition to CFO signifies the company's confidence in his abilities.

data.title: Excelerate Energy increases quarterly dividend to $0.08 per Class A common stock, 33% higher than prior quarter.
data.description: Excelerate Energy, Inc. revealed today that a quarterly cash dividend of $0.08 per share of Class A common stock has been declared by its Board of Directors for the quarter ending June 30, 2025. This represents a notable 33% surge from the previous quarter. The dividend will be distributed on September 4, 2025, to Class A common stockholders listed as of August 20, 2025. Excelerate is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol EE.

data.title: Enpro (NYSE: NPO) announces $0.31/share quarterly dividend, payable on Sept 17, 2025, to shareholders on record as of Sept 3.
data.description: Enpro (NYSE: NPO) based in Charlotte, N.C., announced a quarterly dividend of $0.31 per share. The dividend is set to be paid on September 17, 2025, to shareholders on record as of September 3, 2025.

data.title: Nuvve to give financial update for Q2 2025 on Aug 14, 2025. Conference call at 5:00 PM ET. $NVVE.
data.description: Nuvve Holding Corp. ("Nuvve") announced that it will release its second-quarter financial update for the period ending June 30, 2025, on Thursday, August 14, 2025. The company, known for its expertise in grid modernization and vehicle-to-grid technology, will conduct a conference call at 5:00 PM Eastern Time (2:00 PM PT) on the same day to discuss the financial results and other business updates. Participants interested in joining the call can do so to gain insights into Nuvve’s performance and strategic developments in the second quarter of 2025. This information was shared by Nuvve Holding Corp., listed as NVVE on the Nasdaq, a significant player in the industry.

data.title: A’s partner with Aramark for new Las Vegas ballpark hospitality, adding acclaimed restaurateur Will Guidara.
data.description: In Las Vegas, the Athletics have revealed a lasting agreement for food and beverage services at their upcoming stadium in collaboration with Aramark Sports + Entertainment. Aramark (NYSE: ARMK) enlisted renowned restaurateur and author of the New York Times bestseller "Unreasonable Hospitality," Will Guidara, to assist in shaping the venue's culinary and hospitality experience. This partnership signifies a significant step towards enhancing the fan experience, elevating the standards for ballpark dining.

data.title: Authenticom wins 2025 Gold Stevie Award for Management Team of the Year in Information Technology-Cloud Services.
data.description: In New York on July 31, 2025, Authenticom, a top provider of secure data integration and hygiene solutions for the automotive sector, received the prestigious Gold Stevie Award for Management Team of the Year in Information Technology-Cloud Services. This recognition highlights the company's excellence in this field and the dedication of its team.

data.title: Cryptocurrency markets struggle post-FOMC; Bitcoin down at $116,606, Ethereum $3,726, XRP $3.05, Dogecoin $0.2129. Bitcoin large transaction volume up 7.2%, addresses up 0.4%. 121,983 traders liquidated in 24 hours for $395.41 million. Robinhood crypto trading volume surges in July. Ethereum celebrates 10th birthday with strong July. Ethereum ETFs, Treasury companies hold over $32B in ETH. Full story on Benzinga.com.
data.description: The cryptocurrency markets have experienced a downturn following Bitcoin's inability to maintain its position above the $119,000 threshold. Current prices for major cryptocurrencies stand at $116,606 for Bitcoin, $3,726 for Ethereum, $174.74 for Solana, $3.05 for XRP, $0.2129 for Dogecoin, and $0.00001265 for Shiba Inu. Key data from IntoTheBlock reveals a 7.2% increase in Bitcoin's large transaction volume and a 0.4% rise in daily active addresses, while exchange netflows decreased by 118.3%. Coinglass reports that 121,983 traders were liquidated in the last 24 hours, resulting in losses totaling $395.41 million. Among the top gainers in the past day are Pump.fun (PUMP), Sonic (S), and Toncoin (TON). Notable recent developments include a surge in Robinhood crypto trading volumes in July, insights from Bernstein suggesting it's still early in the bull cycle, Ethereum celebrating its 10th anniversary with a strong July performance that may signal further growth, Ethereum ETFs and treasury companies collectively holding over $32 billion in ETH, and information on Tether's activity. For more details, the full story is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Strategy has launched a $4.2 billion At-The-Market program to issue and sell shares of its Variable Rate Series A Perpetual Stretch Preferred Stock.
data.description: Tysons Corner-based company Strategy™ (Nasdaq: MSTR; STRK; STRF; STRD; STRC) has revealed a sales agreement enabling the issuance and sale of shares of its Variable Rate Series A Perpetual Stretch Preferred Stock, known as "STRC Stock." The aggregate offering price for the shares is up to $4.2 billion under the ATM Program. Strategy intends to conduct sales of the STRC Stock methodically over an extended period.

data.title: MasTec (NYSE: MTZ) surpasses Q2 2025 guidance with 20% revenue growth; CEO credits strong demand climate.
data.description: In Coral Gables, Florida, MasTec, Inc. revealed their second quarter 2025 financial results and revised full-year 2025 financial guidance. The company, listed as NYSE: MTZ, surpassed expectations in Q2 with revenue and earnings growth. CEO Jose Mas noted that the 20% revenue increase showcasing the company's success in capitalizing on high demand and effective execution. The robust performance signifies MasTec's ability to navigate the current market conditions.

data.title: WK Kellogg Co declared a dividend of $0.165/share, payable on Sept 12 for shareowners as of Aug.
data.description: In Battle Creek, Michigan, on July 31, 2025, WK Kellogg Co (NYSE: KLG) revealed that a dividend of $0.165 per share has been declared by its Board of Directors for the common stock of WK Kellogg Co. This dividend is set to be paid on September 12, 2025, to shareholders of record as of the end of business on August [specific date not mentioned in the snippet].

data.title: CHAMPgov chosen by Louisiana to digitally transform OMV, enhancing services for millions in the state.
data.description: A tech company called CHAMP has been chosen by Louisiana to upgrade the state's OMV system. This initiative aims to enhance government services for millions of residents across the state.

data.title: Trisura Group Ltd. to release Q2 2025 results and host earnings call. Details announced. TSX: TSU.
data.description: On July 31, 2025, Trisura Group Ltd. (TSX: TSU), a prominent specialty insurance company, revealed details regarding the release of its financial results for the second quarter of 2025. Trisura Group announced the schedule for the earnings conference call alongside this release.
